name: resolve-bundle-host-computed
description: A descriptor with a hostname-only `bundleHost` (no scheme, no path) and no explicit `bundleUrl`. The resolver MUST compute both the bundle and style URLs as `https://<bundleHost>/bundles/<package>/<version>/<file>` — the path layout matching `@ggui-ai/registry-core`'s `BundleStorage` so a bundle published to one registry resolves cleanly from the other.
